title: tephrosia flammea
intro: Tephrosia flammea, also known as the flame pea or flamelily, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia flammea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia flammea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine and holistic health practices.
